introSection: Toboggan is a travelling steel roller coaster built by US manufacturer Chance Rides currently owned & travelled by UK showman John Wesseldine Jnr.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and white supports. The supports on the helix are blue.

fullText:
Toboggan is a travelling steel roller coaster built by US manufacturer Chance Rides currently owned & travelled by UK showman John Wesseldine Jnr.



Red track and white supports. The supports on the helix are blue.

The cars are enclosed.
